acceptance_criteria: Submitting valid contact data writes a row to the contacts table.
Submitting invalid email shows the field-level error message.
Submit button is disabled while the request is in-flight.
After successful submission, the form clears and shows a success toast.

business_requirements.title: Contact form story
business_requirements.description: End-to-end contact-form story spanning the frontend form widget, the POST /v1/contacts API, and the contacts table.
